violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood filters noted in need of cleaning.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean Food equipment noted stored in an unprotected location. Air vent cover by the shelving above the 3-compartment sink noted not clean alongside with clean food equipment on the shelf.
